headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Federal Realty Investment, Lowers Price Target to $107
summary: Barclays  analyst Richard Hightower   maintains Federal Realty Investment (NYSE:FRT) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $109 to $107.
